question: Which statement applies only to restricted cardholders?
canonical_answer: They can upgrade their GTCC by simply requesting their APC to upgrade their account, agree to a new credit score check and have a credit score above 659.

appears_in.title: Apc Government Travel Card
appears_in.answer: They must validate with their APC that their GTCC is activated and available for use during their travel period.

appears_in.title: Army Gtcc
appears_in.answer: They must validate with their APC that the GTCC has been activated with the travel card vendor.
